title: 「With +（名詞）+ -ing」句型
titleEn: Using with + noun + -ing to introduce background circumstances

omissions: The PDF title has no separate English subtitle; titleEn is an editorial translation.

formula: With + noun / noun phrase + verb-ing, + main clause

formulas.formula: With + noun / noun phrase + verb-ing, + main clause
Main clause, + with + noun / noun phrase + verb-ing

example: With more people working remotely, office culture has changed permanently.
exampleZh: 隨着越來越多人遙距工作，辦公室文化已經永久改變。

examples.en: With more people working remotely, office culture has changed permanently.
examples.zh: 隨着越來越多人遙距工作，辦公室文化已經永久改變。
examples.highlight: With more people working remotely, office culture has changed permanently.

zh: 這個句型用來交代一個背景情況、持續出現的轉變，或與主要事情同時發生的動作。

rules.en: The noun after with performs the -ing action.
rules.zh: with 後面的名詞是進行 -ing 動作的人或事物。
examples: With the baby sleeping, everyone spoke quietly.
句中正在睡覺的是 the baby。

rules.en: The two parts must be logically connected. The structure normally shows a background situation affecting another event, two events happening at the same time, or a continuing change creating a new situation.
rules.zh: 兩部分的事情必須有合理關係。這個句型通常表示一個背景情況影響另一件事、兩件事同時發生，或一個持續轉變帶來新的情況。

rules.en: Use a comma to separate the two parts.
rules.zh: 使用逗號分隔 with 詞組和主要句子。
examples: With the rain falling heavily, we stayed indoors.
We stayed indoors, with the rain falling heavily.

rules.en: Put not before the -ing form for a negative situation.
rules.zh: 如要表達否定情況，把 not 放在 -ing 動詞之前。
examples: With the lift not working, we used the stairs.
升降機不能運作，我們使用樓梯。

rules.en: Use being + past participle when the noun receives an action.
rules.zh: 如果名詞是承受動作的一方，可以使用 with + noun + being + past participle。
examples: With several roads being repaired, drivers should allow extra time.
由於多條道路正在維修，駕駛者應預留更多時間。

rules.en: This structure does not always mean “because”; it may express a reason or simply describe two events happening at the same time.
rules.zh: 這個句型不一定只表示「因為」。它有時表示原因，有時只是交代兩件同時發生的事情。

benefits.en: It makes the background clear. This structure tells the reader what is happening around the main event.
benefits.zh: 這個句型能先交代事情發生時的背景，讓讀者更容易理解主要信息。

benefits.en: It connects two related situations in one sentence. Instead of writing two separate sentences, you can show the relationship between the situations immediately.
benefits.zh: 你不需要把兩個相關情況分成兩句，而可以直接把它們連接起來。

benefits.en: It gives you an alternative to because, as and while. Students often repeat the same connectors, and this structure gives another natural way to express the same relationship.
benefits.zh: 學生經常重複使用 because、as 和 while。這個句型能提供另一種自然的表達方法，令句式不會過於重複。

benefits.en: The two parts can have different subjects. The person or thing performing the -ing action can be different from the subject of the main clause.
benefits.zh: 兩部分可以有不同的主語，因此能自然地描述兩個人或事物同時進行的事情。

benefits.en: It is useful for describing changes and trends in essays, reports, presentations and discussions about society, work, technology and the environment.
benefits.zh: 這個句型適合用於作文、報告、簡報和討論，尤其適合描述社會、工作、科技和環境方面的變化。

benefits.en: It gives you another way to begin a sentence. Beginning with a with + noun + -ing phrase creates sentence variety and draws attention to the background situation.
benefits.zh: 以 with + 名詞 + -ing 開始句子，可以增加句式變化，並先把讀者的注意力帶到重要背景。

sourceOmissions: The PDF title has no separate English subtitle; titleEn is an editorial translation.

en: Rewrite each sentence using with + noun + -ing. Keep the original meaning.
The with phrase may appear at the beginning or end of the answer. Follow the first-word hint.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 with + 名詞 + -ing 改寫以下句子，並保留原意。
with 詞組可以放在答案的句首或句末。請按照所提供的首字作答。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Because the rain was falling heavily, the children stayed indoors.
questions.promptZh: 因為大雨一直下，孩子們留在室內。
questions.answer: With the rain falling heavily, the children stayed indoors.
questions.answerZh: 大雨一直下，孩子們留在室內。
questions.highlight: With the rain falling heavily, the children stayed indoors.

questions.prompt: While several team members were handling different tasks, the manager monitored the project.
questions.promptZh: 幾名團隊成員分別處理不同任務時，經理監察整個項目。
questions.answer: The manager monitored the project, with several team members handling different tasks.
questions.answerZh: 經理監察整個項目，幾名團隊成員則分別處理不同任務。
questions.highlight: The manager monitored the project, with several team members handling different tasks.

questions.prompt: As food prices continue to rise, many families are planning their weekly shopping more carefully.
questions.promptZh: 隨着食品價格持續上升，很多家庭更仔細地計劃每星期的購物。
questions.answer: With food prices continuing to rise, many families are planning their weekly shopping more carefully.
questions.answerZh: 隨着食品價格持續上升，很多家庭更仔細地計劃每星期的購物。
questions.highlight: With food prices continuing to rise, many families are planning their weekly shopping more carefully.

questions.prompt: More children are walking to the new school each day, so the city is redesigning the pedestrian crossing.
questions.promptZh: 每天有更多兒童步行到新學校，所以城市正在重新設計行人過路處。
questions.answer: The city is redesigning the pedestrian crossing, with more children walking to the new school each day.
questions.answerZh: 每天有更多兒童步行到新學校，所以城市正在重新設計行人過路處。
questions.highlight: The city is redesigning the pedestrian crossing, with more children walking to the new school each day.
